subject: [PATCH v5 1/4] nvdimm: Convert nvdimm_bus guard to class

reviews.author: Dave Jiang
reviews.summary: Reviewed-by: Dave Jiang <dave.jiang@intel.com> is present in both messages, indicating approval.

2026-06-03.patch_summary: This patch series converts the nvdimm_bus guard from using DEFINE_GUARD() to DEFINE_CLASS() and DEFINE_CLASS_IS_GUARD(). The change is preparatory for making DEFINE_GUARD() constructors __nonnull_args(), allowing nvdimm_bus to pass NULL without causing a compile error.
